name: GEIS Encoder
description: Geometric Information Encoding System — the bidirectional, lossless converter between geometric tokens and binary. Operates in dense mode [vertex_bits][operator][symbol] preserving full geometric structure, or collapse mode for flat binary compatibility. State tensors (3×3 matrices) handle eigenvalues and projections for geometric transformations.

core_attributes.pattern: bidirectional geometric-binary translation, state tensor projection, lossless encoding
